title: past
description: check if input increases past a threshold

messages.description: if input is > threshold value(s) but last input wasn't

methods.description: clears the memory so a next input may trigger a bang
sets threshold to one or more values

body: [past] bangs when an input is greater than a threshold value and the last value was below or equal to it. The input needs to fall back to a value equal or below the threshold for another bang to be output when it goes past it again.
